name: AzureImageBuilderTaskV2
friendlyName: Azure VM Image Builder Task v2
description: Build images using Azure Image Builder resource provider (API 2024-02-01). Supports workload identity federation, VM boot optimization, validation, and all modern AIB features.
author: Microsoft Corporation (community update)

groups.name: ImageBuilderInput
groups.displayName: Where you want to run this template

inputs.name: managedIdentity
inputs.label: Template Identity Resource Id
inputs.helpMarkDown: User-assigned managed identity resource ID for the image template resource. See https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/virtual-machines/image-builder-overview#permissions

inputs.name: buildVmIdentities
inputs.label: Build VM User-Assigned Identities (optional)
inputs.helpMarkDown: One resource ID per line. These identities are assigned to the build VM so customizer scripts can authenticate to Azure services (e.g. Key Vault). The template identity must have 'Managed Identity Operator' on each.

inputs.name: vnetSubnetId
inputs.label: Build VM Subnet Id
inputs.helpMarkDown: Resource ID of a pre-existing subnet for the build VM and validation VM.

inputs.name: containerInstanceSubnetId
inputs.label: Container Instance Subnet Id (Isolated Builds)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Resource ID of a subnet for Azure Container Instance (ACI) in isolated builds. Must be on the same VNet as the build VM subnet, delegated to ACI. New in API 2024-02-01.

inputs.name: proxyVmSize
inputs.label: Proxy VM Size (optional)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Size of the proxy VM used to pass traffic to the build VM. Not used when containerInstanceSubnetId is specified. Default: Standard_A1_v2.

inputs.name: imageSource
inputs.label: Image type
inputs.helpMarkDown: Select image source: Managed Image, Azure Compute Gallery, or Marketplace

inputs.name: customImageResourceId
inputs.label: Image resource id for Managed Image
inputs.helpMarkDown: Resource ID for Managed Image source.

inputs.name: ImageVersionId
inputs.label: Image version id
inputs.helpMarkDown: Image version resource ID for Azure Compute Gallery source. Use '/versions/latest' to always pick the newest version.

inputs.name: baseImage
inputs.label: Base image
inputs.helpMarkDown: Choose from curated gallery of OS images (latest version used)

inputs.name: baseImagePubOfferSku
inputs.label: Custom Publisher:Offer:Sku (if not in list)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Format: 'Publisher:Offer:Sku', e.g. 'MicrosoftWindowsDesktop:office-365:win11-25h2-avd-m365'

inputs.name: baseImageVersion
inputs.label: Base Image Version (optional)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Platform image version. Default: latest.

inputs.name: platformImagePurchasePlan
inputs.label: Platform Image Purchase Plan (optional)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Format: 'PlanName:PlanProduct:PlanPublisher' for marketplace images that require purchase plan acceptance.

inputs.name: provisioner
inputs.label: Provisioner
inputs.helpMarkDown: Shell for Linux, PowerShell for Windows

inputs.name: windowsUpdateProvisioner
inputs.label: Run Windows Update as last customization
inputs.helpMarkDown: Appends Windows Update customizer (with 5-min pre-wait) as the final step

inputs.name: runElevated
inputs.label: Run Elevated
inputs.helpMarkDown: Run the PowerShell script with elevated privileges

inputs.name: runAsSystem
inputs.label: Run As Local System User
inputs.helpMarkDown: Run with elevated privileges using the Local System user

inputs.name: packagePath
inputs.label: Build path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to build artifacts. Uploaded to blob storage and extracted to C:\BuildArtifacts (Windows) or /tmp (Linux) inside the AIB VM.

inputs.name: inlineScript
inputs.label: Inline customization script
inputs.defaultValue:
# Artifacts available at:
# Windows: C:\BuildArtifacts\<folder>
# Linux: /tmp/<folder>
inputs.helpMarkDown: Inline script for image customization. Build artifacts are at C:\BuildArtifacts (Windows) or /tmp (Linux).

inputs.name: storageAccountName
inputs.label: Storage account
inputs.helpMarkDown: Storage account for staging build artifacts. Must exist in the same subscription.

inputs.name: enableValidation
inputs.label: Enable image validation
inputs.helpMarkDown: Run validation customizers after the image is built but before distribution.

inputs.name: sourceValidationOnly
inputs.label: Source validation only
inputs.helpMarkDown: Validate the source image directly without building a customized image first.

inputs.name: continueDistributeOnFailure
inputs.label: Continue distribute on validation failure
inputs.helpMarkDown: If true, distribute the image even if validation fails. The overall build will still report failure.

inputs.name: validationInlineScript
inputs.label: Validation inline script
inputs.helpMarkDown: Inline script to validate the built image. Uses the same provisioner (Shell/PowerShell) as the customize phase.

inputs.name: distributeType
inputs.label: Distribute type
inputs.helpMarkDown: Output type: Azure Compute Gallery, Managed Image, or VHD

inputs.name: imageIdForDistribute
inputs.label: Image id for managed image
inputs.helpMarkDown: Resource ID for the output Managed Image

inputs.name: galleryImageId
inputs.label: Image id for Azure Compute Gallery Image
inputs.helpMarkDown: Image definition resource ID (without /versions). Use automatic versioning or append /versions/<n.n.n> for explicit version.

inputs.name: managedImageLocation
inputs.label: Location for managed image
inputs.helpMarkDown: Location for managed image output. Example: westeurope

inputs.name: targetRegions
inputs.label: Target regions (comma-separated)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Target regions for Azure Compute Gallery replication. Example: westeurope,northeurope. Maps to the 'targetRegions' API property.

inputs.name: replicationRegions
inputs.label: Replication regions (deprecated, use Target regions)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Deprecated — kept for backward compatibility. Prefer 'Target regions' above.

inputs.name: distributeStorageAccountType
inputs.label: Storage account type for gallery image version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Storage type for the image version in each target region.

inputs.name: excludeFromLatest
inputs.label: Exclude from latest
inputs.helpMarkDown: Exclude this image version from being used as the 'latest' version in the gallery image definition.

inputs.name: distributeVersioningScheme
inputs.label: Versioning scheme
inputs.helpMarkDown: Latest: monotonically increasing version numbers. Source: version based on source image version.

inputs.name: distributeVersioningMajor
inputs.label: Versioning major version
inputs.helpMarkDown: When versioning scheme is 'Latest', specify the major version number under which to generate the next version.

inputs.name: vhdUri
inputs.label: VHD output URI (optional)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure Storage URI for the distributed VHD blob. Omit to use the default storage account in the staging resource group.

inputs.name: ibSubscription
inputs.label: Azure Subscription
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure Resource Manager subscription. Supports workload identity federation (recommended) and service principal with secret.

inputs.name: ibAzureResourceGroup
inputs.label: Resource group
inputs.helpMarkDown: Resource group for the image template.

inputs.name: ibLocation
inputs.label: Location
inputs.helpMarkDown: Location for the image template

inputs.name: buildTimeoutInMinutes
inputs.label: Build timeout (minutes)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Maximum build time. 0 = platform default (4 hours). Min: 6, Max: 960.

inputs.name: vmSize
inputs.label: VM size
inputs.helpMarkDown: VM size for the build VM. Gen1 default: Standard_D1_v2, Gen2 default: Standard_D2ds_v4.

inputs.name: osDiskSizeGB
inputs.label: OS Disk Size (GB)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Override the OS disk size. 0 or empty = use source image size. Can only increase, not decrease.

inputs.name: optimizeVmBoot
inputs.label: Enable VM boot optimization
inputs.helpMarkDown: Enable VM boot optimization to improve image creation time. Sets optimize.vmBoot.state = Enabled.

inputs.name: autoRun
inputs.label: Auto-run on template creation
inputs.helpMarkDown: Automatically start the image build when the template is created. The task still monitors completion regardless.

inputs.name: stagingResourceGroup
inputs.label: Staging resource group (optional)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Resource ID of a pre-existing resource group for AIB staging resources. Must be empty, in the same region, with Contributor/Owner RBAC for the template identity. Leave empty for auto-created staging group.

inputs.name: managedResourceTags
inputs.label: Managed resource tags (JSON)
inputs.helpMarkDown: JSON object of key-value tags to apply to the staging resource group resources. Example: {"env": "dev", "project": "avd"}

inputs.name: errorHandlingOnCustomizerError
inputs.label: On customizer error
inputs.helpMarkDown: cleanup: remove staging resources on failure (default). abort: leave resources for debugging.

inputs.name: errorHandlingOnValidationError
inputs.label: On validation error
inputs.helpMarkDown: cleanup: remove staging resources on failure (default). abort: leave resources for debugging.
